decision.rationale: The plate honors several rules but shows key deviations on two others. Specifically, IR.sean.hair.center-cowlick is honored with a clear upward tuft at the crown. IR.sean.hair.silhouette-tousled-medium-short is honored as it shows a tousled, medium-short silhouette with multiple irregular outer contour tufts. IR.sean.style.line-weight-hb-to-2b-warm-graphite is honored with warm graphite lines that vary in weight, conveying a hand-drawn feel. IR.sean.face.blue-eyes is honored with mid-cool blue irises on the head's horizontal midline. However, IR.sean.face.jaw-line-angular-not-rounded is borderline/violated because the chin is rounded in profile rather than squared (flat across at the base), and the mandibular corner is soft rather than a defined angle. IR.sean.hair.dirty-blonde-color is borderline/violated because while the dirty-blonde hue is correct, the hair is rendered with soft-painted highlights and shadow gradients instead of a flat color fill with warm-graphite cross-hatching.
